arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Brighton – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City welcome a high-flying Brighton to the Etihad Stadium this weekend. The Premier League champions have the opportunity to break into the top four with a win this afternoon. Pep Guardiola and his players are two points behind fourth-place Chelsea, who travel to Arsenal on Sunday. arts.ttl: Tuchel issues Grealish warning – but insists he remains part of plans
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel insists Jack Grealish is still very much part of his England plans going forward, but he has warned him about how his behaviour off the pitch might be perceived, and says he has a responsibility to appear more "calm".

arts.ttl: Five players who could leave Man City this summer
arts.sum: Even if Milan opt against signing Walker, he is still expected to leave Man City this year, with his current deal at the Etihad Stadium due to expire in 2026. John Stones hasn’t made 25 appearances in a single Premier League season since his debut campaign at Man City and his injury-hit time at the club could end this summer.
